en.text: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8074 {to stun (or intransitively, grow numb), i.e. devastate or (figuratively) stupefy (both usually in a passive sense)}

senses.gloss_en: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8074 {to stun (or intransitively, grow numb), i.e. devastate or (figuratively) stupefy (both usually in a passive sense)}
